meaning: vt.注定,规定,任命(牧师)vi.颁布命令
examples: Do for Aaron and his sons everything I have commanded you, taking seven days to ordain them.
And so ordain I in all churches.
Please ordain me a Bhikkhu so that I can develop the Noble Eightfold Path.
The General Assembly will consider whether the church should ordain ministers who are in same-sex relationships.
Bishop Reade ordained male and female deacons and made provision for the Bishop of Lancaster to ordain women priests.
